html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift

Icker Preserve KitEmpty Icker PreserveFilled Icker Preserve

“The Icker completely stops the spoilage of food placed in it.”

-For structure

An Icker Preserve can be used to store Food items indefinitely. It has 1 slot and can store up to one full stack of the Food. No Mobs or Bosses will eat the food inside. Putting Light Bulbs and Glow Berries inside will make it glow in a small radius, like they are dropped on the ground.

Creatures cannot be put inside except for Freshwater Fish, Eel and Ocean Fish. Putting a Scorching Sunfish, Ice Bream, or Thermal Stone will heat up or cool down the surrounding environment. Scorching Sunfish will also set nearby flammable items on fire.

W.O.B.O.T. and Winona's W.I.N.bot will not interact with it.

The Icker Preserve Kit cannot be deconstructed, but crafting the kit will return Empty Bottles back.

Tips

  • Only survivor edible food can be put inside. Food items like Steamed Twigs or Eight Treasure Mud Pie cannot be stored, except Eternal Fruitcake.

Trivia

  • In a Rhymes with Play stream, Icker Preserves were mentioned as a reference to the cuisine of the 60s - 70s.[Verification Needed]

Gallery

  • Icker Preserve concept art from Depths of Duplicity stream from Rhymes with Play.

Icker Preserve KitEmpty Icker PreserveFilled Icker Preserve
“I'll preserve my judgement.”
–Wilson, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Talk about re-purposing.”
–Willow, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Easy job for Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Child's play.”
–Wendy, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“WHY SHOULD I HELP YOU?”
–WX-78, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“A simple food preservation method.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“I have bad memories of that gunk.”
–Woodie, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Pass. I don't do sticky.”
–Maxwell, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Peasant's wörk.”
–Wigfrid, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“We can build it!”
–Webber, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Some assembly is required.”
–Warly, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“What make with Bad Sticky?”
–Wormwood, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Guess I should put'er together.”
–Winona, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Grrr... Not on the fur!”
–Wortox, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Me make!”
–Wurt, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“This might be messy to build.”
–Walter, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Best get to it then.”
–Wanda, when examining an Icker Preserve Kit
“Looks empty.”
–Wilson, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“There's nothing in goop.”
–Willow, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“Good place for Wolfgang snacks.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“Not so dangerous now...”
–Wendy, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“I HAVE NO USE FOR THIS”
–WX-78, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“The dark gelatinous substance, colloquially known as Icker, will preserve our food items.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“It's supposed to keep our lunch from spoiling, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“I don't trust that infernal jelly.”
–Maxwell, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“Önce a mighty deathtrap, nöw a pantry.”
–Wigfrid, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“Looks like jelly.”
–Webber, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“What a... interesting way to store food.”
–Warly, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“Good Sticky now?”
–Wormwood, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“At least we found some use for that muck.”
–Winona, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“I do declare, there's nothing there.”
–Wortox, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“What we pre-save?”
–Wurt, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“What should we put in there, Woby?”
–Walter, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“It'll extend the expiration date.”
–Wanda, when examining an empty Icker Preserve
“It's keeping it... fresh?”
–Wilson, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“I guess it's working?”
–Willow, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Hungry Wolfgang is not picky Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Some things can't be preserved.”
–Wendy, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“ONLY SENSITIVE FLESHBAGS NEED TO EAT UNSPOILED FOOD”
–WX-78, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“The contents are perfectly safe to consume.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Who'd wanna eat that now?”
–Woodie, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Somebody taste it first!”
–Maxwell, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Thy mörsels, it döth preserveth.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Yummy!”
–Webber, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“It looks most unappetizing.”
–Warly, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Thanks Good Sticky!”
–Wormwood, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“And just like that, I ain't hungry no more.”
–Winona, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Congealed and sealed!”
–Wortox, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Wow. Wicker-lady right! It pre-saved!”
–Wurt, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“It's floating in that gloop!”
–Walter, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“Suspended in time.”
–Wanda, when examining a filled Icker Preserve
“The Icker completely stops the spoilage of food placed in it.”
-For structure
An Icker Preserve can be used to store Food items indefinitely. It has 1 slot and can store up to one full stack of the Food. No Mobs or Bosses will eat the food inside. Putting Light Bulbs and Glow Berries inside will make it glow in a small radius, like they are dropped on the ground.
Creatures cannot be put inside except for Freshwater Fish, Eel and Ocean Fish. Putting a Scorching Sunfish, Ice Bream, or Thermal Stone will heat up or cool down the surrounding environment. Scorching Sunfish will also set nearby flammable items on fire.
W.O.B.O.T. and Winona's W.I.N.bot will not interact with it.
The Icker Preserve Kit cannot be deconstructed, but crafting the kit will return Empty Bottles back.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Only survivor edible food can be put inside. Food items like Steamed Twigs or Eight Treasure Mud Pie cannot be stored, except Eternal Fruitcake.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
In a Rhymes with Play stream, Icker Preserves were mentioned as a reference to the cuisine of the 60s - 70s.[Verification Needed]
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Icker Preserve concept art from Depths of Duplicity stream from Rhymes with Play.

{{Scrapbook Info|The Icker completely stops the spoilage of food placed in it.|For structure}}
An '''Icker Preserve''' can be used to store [[Food]] items indefinitely. It has 1 slot and can store up to one full stack of the Food. No [[Mobs]] or [[Bosses]] will eat the food inside. Putting [[Light Bulb/DST|Light Bulbs]] and [[Glow Berry/DST|Glow Berries]] inside will make it glow in a small radius, like they are dropped on the ground. 

Creatures cannot be put inside except for [[Freshwater Fish]], {{DSTL|Eel}} and [[Ocean Fish]]. Putting a [[Scorching Sunfish]], [[Ice Bream]], or {{DSTL|Thermal Stone}} will heat up or cool down the surrounding environment. Scorching Sunfish will also set nearby flammable items on fire.

[[W.O.B.O.T.]] and [[Winona/Don't Starve Together|Winona's]] [[W.I.N.bot]] will not interact with it.

The '''Icker Preserve Kit''' cannot be deconstructed, but crafting the kit will return [[Empty Bottle/DST|Empty Bottles]] back.

== {{Tips}} Tips ==
* Only survivor edible food can be put inside. Food items like [[Steamed Twigs]] or [[Eight Treasure Mud Pie]] cannot be stored, except [[Eternal Fruitcake]].

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* In a Rhymes with Play stream, Icker Preserves were mentioned as a reference to the cuisine of the 60s - 70s.{{verify|needs link to the stream}}
